TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Avery_Bradley, title = Avery_Bradley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Avery_Bradley} }

S.FORM: == Avery Bradley == Avery Bradley hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 11, Avery Bradley, biru na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga pqwsan biru krahu cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Avery Bradley == Avery Bradley hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 11, Avery Bradley, biru na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga pqwsan biru krahu cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == a*erj ő≤ra*lej == a*erj ő≤ra*lej ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēaras~…ē mari Ē tpu ¶~ ®iŇč taj s~…ēuruw. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, a*erj ő≤ra*lej, ő≤iru na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
